content.content: The file C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\explore\explore.css has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Both changes are applied:

1. **`ExplorePage.jsx`** — Replaced the flat text empty state with a branching conditional: search errors and search-mode "no results" still use the plain `search-empty-state` div, while the default no-posts case now renders the polished `explore-empty-state` block with a glass-ring `FlameIcon`, title, and subtitle.

2. **`explore.css`** — Added ~40 lines of empty state styles (glass ring, centered layout, Lexend Deca title, muted description) right before the mobile section, following the collections empty state pattern.
